def solve(nums, queries)
  ans = []
  queries.each do |q|
    l, r, t = q
    freq = Hash.new(0)
    (l..r).each do |i|
      num = nums[i]
      freq[num] += 1
    end
    candidates = freq.select { |k, v| v >= t }
    if candidates.empty?
      ans << -1
    else
      max_freq = -1
      best = -1
      candidates.each do |k, v|
        if v > max_freq || (v == max_freq && k < best)
          max_freq = v
          best = k
        end
      end
      ans << best
    end
  end
  ans
end
